passive.name: Dragon Practice
passive.description: Hitting champions with Abilities and killing enemies with Super Scorcher Breath grants a stack of Dragon Practice. Stacks increase the damage of Smolders basic Abilities.

wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Innate:}} '''Smolder''' generates a [[stack]] of {{as|''Dragon Practice''|buzzword3}} each time he hits an enemy champion with an [[champion ability|ability]], or whenever ''{{ai|Super Scorcher Breath|Smolder}}'' kills a {{tip|minion}} or {{tip|monster}}. His basic abilities deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on stacks.
* ''{{ai|Q|Smolder}}'': Deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|40 to 70 for 11|0 to 100|formula=40 x (1 + 0.75 * critical strike chance)|color=critical chance}} of {{as|''Dragon Practice'' stacks|buzzword3}}.
* ''{{ai|W|Smolder}}'': Explosions deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|55% of ''Dragon Practice'' stacks|buzzword3}}.
* ''{{ai|E|Smolder}}'': Attacks each deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|20% of ''Dragon Practice'' stacks|buzzword3}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{ai|Super Scorcher Breath|Smolder}} still grants stacks if the target dies while the initial missile is in flight.
* {{ai|Achooo!|Smolder}} can only grant a stack of {{as|Dragon Practice|buzzword3}} with the first hit against each enemy champion.
* {{ai|Flap, Flap, Flap|Smolder}} can only grant one stack of {{as|Dragon Practice|buzzword3}} per cast.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Smolder}} generates a stack of ''Dragon Practice'' from damaging champions with abilities, or when ''{{ai|Super Scorcher Breath|Smolder}}'' kills {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}. His basic abilities deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on stacks.

Q.name: Super Scorcher Breath
Q.description: Smolder breathes fire on an enemy. As he gains more stacks, this ability becomes more powerful.
Q.tooltip:
Smolder belches flame, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage + {{ spell.smolderp:passive_qdamageincrease }} magic damage. If the target dies, Smolder refunds {{ manarestore }} Mana, once per cast.

Based on stacks of Dragon Practice, this Ability evolves to gain the following effects:{{ stacktier1 }} Stacks: Damages all enemies surrounding the target.{{ stacktier2 }} Stacks: Sends {{ tier2_numberofblowback }} explosions beyond the target that deal {{ tier2_blowbackpercentagedamage }}% of this Ability's damage.{{ stacktier3 }} Stacks: Burns the target, dealing {{ tier3_burn }} max Health true damage over {{ tier3_dotlength }} seconds. Enemy champions that drop below {{ tier3_executethreshold }} total health while burning are killed instantly.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Smolder''' spits a fireball at the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}}, increased by {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|0 to {{#expr:({{#var:cmod}}-1)*100}} for 11|0 to 100|formula={{#expr:{{#var:cmod}}-1}} × critical strike chance}}|critical chance}}, and applies {{tip|on-hit}} and {{tip|on-attack}} effects at 100% effectiveness and {{stil|life steal}} at 50% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}} to {{#var:b5}}}} {{as|(+ {{#var:ad}}% AD)}}|Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:dmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:dmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:dmod}}}}% AD)}}}}
{{st|Maximum Physical Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:cmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:cmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:cmod}}}}% AD)}}|Maximum Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Super Scorcher Breath'' becomes empowered with new effects based on ''{{as|{{ai|I|Smolder}} stacks|buzzword3}}'':
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Tier 1 - 25 stacks:}} The fireball explodes upon collision to deal the same {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies and apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness and {{stil|life steal}} at 50% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Tier 2 - 125 stacks:}} The fireball sends forth 1 {{as|(+ {{fd|1.5}} per 100 ''{{ai|I|Smolder}}'' stacks)|buzzword3}} bolts of fire in an arc upon collision that explode at maximum range, dealing {{ap|{{#var:t2_mod}}*100}}% of the same damage to enemies hit and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 75% effectiveness and {{stil|life steal}} at 50% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.leveling4:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:t2_mod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}}}% AD)}}|Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:dmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}}% AD)}}}}
{{st|Maximum Physical Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}}}}% AD)}}|Maximum Non-Champion Damage|{{ap|{{#var:b1}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}} to {{#var:b5}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:ad}}*{{#var:t2_mod}}*{{#var:cmod}}*{{#var:dmod}}}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Tier 3 - 225 stacks:}} Enemies hit are set on fire for 3 seconds, causing them to take {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} equal to{{ft|{{as|{{#var:t3_ad}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{#var:t3_ap}}% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ {{fd|{{#var:t3_i}}}}% per 100 ''{{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}}'' stacks)|buzzword3}} {{as|of their '''maximum''' health}} over the duration, capped at 300 against monsters.|{{as|{{ap|{{#var:t3_ad}}/3|round=2}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:t3_ap}}/3|round=2}}% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|{{#var:t3_i}}/3|round=2}}% per 100 ''{{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}}'' stacks)|buzzword3}} {{as| of their '''maximum''' health}} each second, capped at {{ap|300/3}} per tick against monsters.}}Subsequent applications of the burn stack, though not refreshing the duration of the previous burn. Enemy {{tip|champions}} afflicted with the burn are also {{tip|execute|executed}} once '''Smolder''' deals damage to them that would leave them below {{as|{{fd|6.5}}% of their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description6: ''Super Scorcher Breath'' deals 110% damage against {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.target range: {{tt|{{tip|er|icononly = true}} 550 (+ 100% '''bonus''' [[range]])|Always equal to Smolder's attack range}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|285|Tier 1 explosion}} / {{tt|150|Tier 2 missile explosions at max range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|default damage}} for the burn, {{tip|spell damage}} for the fireball, and {{tip|area damage}} for the explosions.
* '''Smolder''' can't declare basic attacks for a brief moment after the cast time.
* Only '''Smolder's''' damage counts for triggering the execute.
** If the target is below the threshold while afflicted with the burn, they will be executed on the next instance of damage dealt by '''Smolder''', which includes the burn tick.
* If ''Super Scorcher Breath'' would damage the target to below the execution threshold, they are executed on the same damage instance.
* At 125 {{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}} stacks, the fireball will launch 2 bolts.
* At 225 {{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}} stacks, the burn's damage based on the target's health ratio will increase by at least {{fd|1.8}}%.
* ''Super Scorcher Breath'' can only hit enemies once per cast.
* The minion and monster damage modifier applies only to the physical damage.
* The bolts apply the bonus magic damage from {{ai|I|Smolder}} at 75% damage.
** This damage does not benefit from life steal.
* Only ''Super Scorcher Breath's'' initial fireball missile can be {{tip|block|blocked}} and {{tip|dodge|dodged}}.
** The application of the burn is negated in both cases.
** The fireball can still explode on-collision and fire the bolts in both cases.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Smolder}} spits a fireball that deals {{as|physical damage}} to the target enemy.
wiki_detail.blurb2:
''Super Scorcher Breath'' becomes empowered with new effects based ''{{as|{{ai|I|Smolder}} stacks|buzzword3}}'':
* {{sbc|25 stacks:}} The fireball explodes upon collision to deal {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies.
* {{sbc|125 stacks:}} The fireball sends forth bolts of fire that deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. The number of bolts increases based on stacks.
* {{sbc|225 stacks:}} Enemies hit will burn for {{as|true damage}} based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}} over a short time. Enemy {{WRtip|champions}} are also {{tip|execute|executed}} {{as|at low health}} based on stacks.

W.name: Achooo!
W.description: Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze that explodes when hitting enemy champions.
W.tooltip:
Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze, dealing {{ initialdamage }} physical damage and Slowing by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds.

Hitting champions causes an explosion, dealing {{ explosiondamage }} physical + {{ spell.smolderp:passive_wdamageincrease }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Smolder''' sneezes a fiery glob in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 35% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, slowing down in missile speed after travelling {{tt|1200|estimated}} units. Hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}} creates an explosion that deals {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies, with subsequent explosions against the same target dealing 75% damage of the previous explosion's damage.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Glob Physical Damage|{{ap|45 to 165}} {{as|(+ 25% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}}}}
{{st|Explosion Physical Damage|{{ap|25 to 85}} {{as|(+ 25% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 80% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Smolder''' can't declare basic attacks for a brief moment after the cast time.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} can block either the glob or the explosion, but not both.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Smolder}} sneezes forth a glob that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them. Hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}} creates an explosion that deals {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies.

E.name: Flap, Flap, Flap
E.description: Smolder takes flight ignoring terrain and bombarding the lowest health enemy.
E.tooltip:
Smolder takes flight, gaining {{ movespeed*100 }}% Move Speed and ignoring terrain for {{ duration }} seconds.

While flying, Smolder bombards the lowest Health enemy {{ totalnumberofattacks }} (rounded down) times for {{ damageperhit }} physical damage + {{ spell.smolderp:ebonusdamage }} magic damage per hit.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Smolder''' takes flight for {{fd|1.25}} seconds, becoming {{tip|ghosted}} and gaining {{sti|{{as|75% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}}, {{tip|unobstructed vision}}, and the ability to ignore terrain collision. While in flight, he automatically fires up to 5 {{as|(+ {{fd|0.75}} per 100 ''{{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}}'' stacks)|buzzword3}} bolts at the nearest and {{tt|most wounded|Lowest health percent}} {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} with each hit and prioritizing enemy champions.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Physical Damage per Hit|{{ap|15 to 35}} {{as|(+ 10% AD)}}}}
{{st|Minimum Total Physical Damage|{{ap|15*5 to 35*5}} {{as|(+ {{ap|10*5}}% AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: ''Flap, Flap, Flap'' ends immediately if '''Smolder''' casts one of his abilities or becomes {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Smolder's''' {{stil|attack range}} is reduced to 0 during ''Flap, Flap, Flap''.
* '''Smolder''' can't declare basic attacks for a brief moment after the end of the effect.
** This is due to his attack range being reduced to 0, it doesn't apply when '''Smolder''' is very close to his target.
* The number of additional bolts based on {{ai|Dragon Practice|Smolder}} stacks are rounded down.
* '''Smolder''' reveals himself while attacking enemies, even inside terrain.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block only one bolt.
* Self {{tip|immobilize|immobilizations}} such as {{ii|Zhonya's Hourglass}} also count for ending ''Flap, Flap, Flap''.
* {{si|Recall}} is disabled while '''Smolder''' is inside terrain.
* ''Flap, Flap, Flap'' can interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* If '''Smolder''' is inside terrain when the effect ends, he will be placed correspondingly to the nearest valid space.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Smolder''' is flying:
{{ct|attack=Causes '''Smolder''' to move towards the attack target.|cast=interrupts|move=true|items==true,,interrupts|spells=true|interrupts=death,root}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Smolder}} takes flight for a short time, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} and the ability to ignore terrain collision. While in flight, he automatically fires bolts at a nearby enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} with each hit. The number of attacks increases based on {{sti|{{as|critical strike chance}}}}.

R.name: MMOOOMMMM!
R.description: Smolder calls his mom to breath fire from above, dealing extra damage and slowing enemies in the center of her fire.
R.tooltip:
Smolder's mom breathes fire from above, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. Enemies in the center take {{ tooltiponly_totalsweetspotdamage }} physical damage instead and are Slowed by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds.

Smolder's mom heals her son for {{ momhealcalc }} Health if she hits him.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Smolder''' shouts for his mother to attack from above, causing her to exhale a wave of fire from behind him and towards the target direction, granting {{tip|sight}} of its {{tt|surroundings|Cannot grant sight through terrain and can only grant sight into brush when the center part goes through that brush}} as it travels. The wave {{tip|heal|heals}} '''Smolder''' and deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, with those in the center taking {{ccs|50% increased damage|physical}} and becoming {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 40% for 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Smolder}} shouts for his mother to attack from above, causing her to exhale a wave of fire along his path. The wave {{as|{{sti|heals}}|heal}} '''Smolder''' and deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, enemies within the center are dealt {{ccs|increased damage|physical}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
